title: ixeris lamii
intro: Ixeris lamii, also known as Japanese dandelion or Japanese false dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of ixeris lamii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
